# Alternating Direction Implicit

**Summary**: An iterative method that solves systems of equations by splitting them into lower-dimensional problems.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993]] evaluated ADI for its ability to handle multi-phase flow and larger grid sizes.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The ADI method was superior to all SOR techniques in simulation of the three oil-water problems when using single relaxation factors. ([[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993, p. 41]])
